title: Youtube Poop: Haruhi Grows a Binary Christmas Tree
description:
Ta da!  A special Christmas Youtube Poop!  Why is this so special you may ask?  Because as a present, I've added no earrape!  There is some distortion and slight pick-ups in volume, but absolutely NO earrape!  Now you can chest your roastnuts and shut your presents without having a hearing aid in your ear.

Merry Christmas everyone!  Enjoy! :)
